top_stories.title: Everything Google announced at its Android Show, from Googlebooks to vibe-coded widgets
top_stories.description: Google unveiled its new AI-first Googlebooks laptops, more agentic Gemini features, vibe-coded Android widgets, Gemini in Chrome, refreshed Android Auto, and more ahead of I/O.
top_stories.author: Sarah Perez, Ivan Mehta, Aisha Malik
top_stories.content: Google unveiled its new AI-first Googlebooks laptops, more agentic Gemini features, vibe-coded Android widgets, Gemini in Chrome, refreshed Android Auto, and more ahead of I/O.

top_stories.title: Halliburton enhances seismic workflow creation with Amazon Bedrock and Generative AI
top_stories.description: In this post, we'll explore how we built a proof-of-concept that converts natural language queries into executable seismic workflows while providing a question-answering capability for Halliburton's Seismic Engine tools and documentation. We'll cover the technical details of the solution, share evaluation results showing workflow acceleration of up to 95%, and discuss key learnings that can help other organizations enhance their complex technical workflows with generative AI.
top_stories.author: Yuan Tian
top_stories.content: In this post, we'll explore how we built a proof-of-concept that converts natural language queries into executable seismic workflows while providing a question-answering capability for Halliburton's Seismic Engine tools and documentation. We'll cover the technical details of the solution, share evaluation results showing workflow acceleration of up to 95%, and discuss key learnings that can help other organizations enhance their complex technical workflows with generative AI.

top_stories.title: The rise of agent  experience (AX)
top_stories.description: AI agents are becoming active participants in commerce, logistics, and enterprise systems. This shift is creating demand for a new product layer built for machines rather than humans, where negotiation, semantic visibility, and autonomous execution matter as much as traditional UX.
top_stories.author: Rohan Mitra
top_stories.content: AI agents are becoming active participants in commerce, logistics, and enterprise systems. This shift is creating demand for a new product layer built for machines rather than humans, where negotiation, semantic visibility, and autonomous execution matter as much as traditional UX.

top_stories.title: Meet AntAngelMed: A 103B-Parameter Open-Source Medical Language Model Built on a 1/32 Activation-Ratio MoE Architecture
top_stories.description: MedAIBase has released AntAngelMed, a 103B-parameter open-source medical language model that uses a 1/32 activation-ratio Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture to activate only 6.1B parameters at inference time, matching the performance of roughly 40B dense models while exceeding 200 tokens per second on H20 hardware. Built on Ling-flash-2.0 and trained through a three-stage pipeline of continual pre-training, supervised fine-tuning, and GRPO-based reinforcement learning, the model ranks first...
top_stories.author: Asif Razzaq
top_stories.content: MedAIBase has released AntAngelMed, a 103B-parameter open-source medical language model that uses a 1/32 activation-ratio Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture to activate only 6.1B parameters at inference time, matching the performance of roughly 40B dense models while exceeding 200 tokens per second on H20 hardware.
